enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Payments Banks -
Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Payments Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance, unless
indicated otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: upon issuance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Payments Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'PBs' and individually as a 'PB').
enriched_requirements.object: Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'PBs' and individually as a 'PB')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Accounts with survivorship clause' mean joint deposit accounts styled as
'either or survivor', or 'anyone or survivor', or 'former or survivor' or 'latter or survivor'
or any other such clause.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Accounts with survivorship clause' mean joint deposit accounts styled as 'either or survivor', or 'anyo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'Apostille' means a certificate that authenticates the origin of a public document
(e.g., a birth, marriage or death certificate, a judgment, an extract of a register or a
notarial attestation).
enriched_requirements.object: the origin of a public document (e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Bank Induced Transaction means a transaction in the account initiated by the
bank as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments, penalties,
taxes.
enriched_requirements.object: account initiated by the bank as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments, penalties, taxes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall put in place approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms
to ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service.
enriched_requirements.object: policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Matters relating to customer service shall be deliberated by the Board to ensure
that the instructions are implemented meaningfully.
enriched_requirements.object: Board to ensure that the instructions are implemented meaningfully

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Commitment to hassle-free
service to the customer at large and the common person in particular shall be a major
responsibility of the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customer service shall be projected as a priority objective of banks along with profit,
growth and fulfilment of social obligations.
enriched_requirements.object: priority objective of banks along with profit, growth and fulfilment of social obligations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall have policies for the following:
B.2.1 Comprehensive Deposit Policy
enriched_requirements.object: following: B

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall formulate a transparent and comprehensive policy setting out the rights
of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive policy setting out the rights of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall cover
all aspects of operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and other related issues
to facilitate interaction of depositors at branch levels.
enriched_requirements.object: operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and other related issues to facilitate interaction of depositors at branch level

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such a policy shall also be
explicit regarding secrecy and confidentiality of the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: secrecy and confidentiality of the customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall formulate a comprehensive and transparent policy taking into account
its technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clearing
<image>
arrangements and other internal arrangements for collection through correspondents.
enriched_requirements.object: transparent policy taking into account its technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clearing <image

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy inter alia shall cover the following three aspects:
(1) Immediate Credit for Local / Outstation cheques
(2) Time frame for Collection of Local / Outstation Instruments
(3) Interest payment for delayed collection
B.2.3 Customer Compensation Policy
enriched_requirements.object: aspects: (1) Immediate Credit for Local / Outstation cheques (2) Time frame for Collection of Local / Outstation Instruments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall have a Board approved Customer Compensation Policy which shall, at
a minimum, incorporate the following aspects:
(1) Erroneous Debits arising on fraudulent or other transactions,
(2) Payment of interest for delays in collection,
(3) Payment of interest for delay in issue of duplicate draft, and
(4) Other unauthorised actions of the bank leading to a financial loss to customer.
enriched_requirements.object: Customer Compensation Policy which shall, at a minimum, incorporate the following aspects: (1) Erroneous Debits arising on fraud

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall ensure that wide publicity is given to the above policies formulated by
it by placing them prominently on the website as well as displaying them on the
notice board of its branches.
enriched_requirements.object: is given to the above policies formulated by it by placing them prominently on the website as well as displaying them on th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall also take necessary steps to keep the
customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it, from time
to time.
enriched_requirements.object: to keep the customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it, from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The customers shall be clearly apprised of the assurances of the bank on
the services provided, at the time of establishment of the initial relationship, be it
as a depositor, borrower or otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: the assurances of the bank on the services provided, at the time of establishment of the initial relationship, be it as a depos

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall constitute a Customer Service Committee of the Board and include
experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the bank to
formulate policies and assess the compliance thereof internally.
enriched_requirements.object: Committee of the Board and include experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the bank to formulate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customer Service Committee of the Board, illustratively, shall address the
following:
(1) Formulation of a Comprehensive Deposit Policy,
<image>
(2) Issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operations of his / her
account,
(3) Product approval process with a view to suitability and appropriateness,
(4) Annual survey of depositor satisfaction, and
(5) Triennial audit of such services.
enriched_requirements.object: Formulation of a Comprehensive Deposit Policy, <image> (2) Issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operati

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Committee shall also examine any other issues having a bearing on the
quality of customer service rendered.
enriched_requirements.object: issues having a bearing on the quality of customer service rendered

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A detailed memorandum reviewing customer service / customer care aspects of a
PB shall be placed once in every six months to the Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: every six months to the Board of Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Prompt
corrective action shall be initiated wherever service quality / skill gaps are noticed.
enriched_requirements.object: quality / skill gaps are noticed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have a Standing Committee on Customer Service, cutting across
various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee
driving the implementation process and providing relevant feedback.
enriched_requirements.object: on Customer Service, cutting across various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee driving th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
Customer Service Committee of the Board shall oversee and review / modify the
initiatives.
enriched_requirements.object: modify the initiatives

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These two Committees shall be mutually reinforcing with one feeding
into the other.
enriched_requirements.object: one feeding into the other

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The constitution and functions of the Standing Committee shall be on the lines
indicated below:
(1) The Standing Committee shall be chaired by the CMD / CEO or the ED and
include non-officials as its members to enable an independent feedback on the
quality of customer service rendered by the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: indicated below: (1) The Standing Committee shall be chaired by the CMD / CEO or the ED and include non-officials as its members to en

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Standing Committee shall be entrusted not only with the task of ensuring
timely and effective compliance of the Reserve Bank's instructions on customer
service, but also that of receiving the necessary feedback to determine that the
action taken by various departments of the PB is in tune with the spirit and intent
of such instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: with the task of ensuring timely and effective compliance of the Reserve Bank's instructions on customer service, but also that

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The Standing Committee shall, on an ongoing basis, review the practice and
procedures prevalent in the PB and take necessary corrective action.
enriched_requirements.object: basis, review the practice and procedures prevalent in the PB and take necessary corrective action

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(4) The Standing Committee shall submit a brief report periodically to the
Customer Service Committee of the Board on its performance during its tenure
indicating, inter alia, the areas reviewed, procedures / practices identified and
simplified / introduced.
enriched_requirements.object: periodically to the Customer Service Committee of the Board on its performance during its tenure indicating, inter alia, the are

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The Standing Committee shall act as the bridge between various departments
of the PB and the Board / Customer Service Committee of the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: between various departments of the PB and the Board / Customer Service Committee of the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall display latest updated information relating to interest rates and service
charges as per the format given in Annex I on its website.
enriched_requirements.object: relating to interest rates and service charges as per the format given in Annex I on its website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall be easily
accessible from the Home Page of its website.
enriched_requirements.object: the Home Page of its website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall adhere to the instructions and procedures for opening and operating
deposit accounts to safeguard against unscrupulous persons opening accounts
mainly to use them as conduit for fraudulently encashing payment instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: and procedures for opening and operating deposit accounts to safeguard against unscrupulous persons opening accounts mainly

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, in view of receipt of continuous complaints of fraudulent encashment by
unscrupulous persons opening deposit accounts in the name/s similar to already
established entities, resulting in erroneous and unauthorised debit of drawers'
accounts, the PB shall remain vigilant to prevent such lapses and issue necessary
instructions to the branches / staff.
enriched_requirements.object: such lapses and issue necessary instructions to the branches / staff

conditions: in case of any fraud

if the PB is convinced that an irregularity / fraud has been
committed by its staff towards any constituent
where the PB is at fault

where neither the PB is at fault nor the customer is at fault but the fault
lies elsewhere in the system
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, a PB is advised that:
(1) in case of any fraud, if the PB is convinced that an irregularity / fraud has been
committed by its staff towards any constituent, the bank shall at once acknowledge
its liability and pay the just claim,
(2) in cases where the PB is at fault, it shall compensate customers without demur,
and
(3) in cases where neither the PB is at fault nor the customer is at fault but the fault
lies elsewhere in the system, then also the PB shall compensate the customers (up
to a limit) as part of a Board approved customer relations policy.
enriched_requirements.object: liability and pay the just claim, (2) in cases where the PB is at fault, it shall compensate customers without demur, and (3)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The systems and procedures in PBs shall be designed to make customers feel
safe about carrying out electronic banking transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: customers feel safe about carrying out electronic banking transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To achieve this, a PB shall
put in place:
(1) appropriate systems and procedures to ensure safety and security of electronic
banking transactions carried out by customers;
enriched_requirements.object: appropriate systems and procedures to ensure safety and security of electronic banking transactions carried out by customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall ask its customers to mandatorily register for SMS alerts and wherever
available register for e-mail alerts, for electronic banking transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: mandatorily register for SMS alerts and wherever available register for e-mail alerts, for electronic banking transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The SMS
alerts shall mandatorily be sent to the customers, while email alerts may be sent,
wherever registered.
enriched_requirements.object: the customers, while email alerts may be sent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The customers shall be advised to notify their PB of any
unauthorised electronic banking transaction at the earliest after the occurrence of
<image>
such transaction and informed that the longer the time taken to notify the PB, the
higher will be the risk of loss to the PB / customer.
enriched_requirements.object: their PB of any unauthorised electronic banking transaction at the earliest after the occurrence of <image> such transaction and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To facilitate this, the PB shall
provide customers with 24x7 access through multiple channels (at a minimum, via
website, phone banking, SMS, e-mail, IVR, a dedicated toll-free helpline, reporting
to home branch, etc.) for reporting unauthorised transactions that have taken place
and/ or loss or theft of payment instrument such as card, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: access through multiple channels (at a minimum, via website, phone banking, SMS, e-mail, IVR, a dedicated toll-free helpli

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall also enable
customers to instantly respond by "Reply" to the SMS and e-mail alerts and the
customers shall not be required to search for a web page or an e-mail address to
notify the objection, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: for a web page or an e-mail address to notify the objection

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As an alternative, the bank shall prove and alternate
number in the transaction alert SMS itself, to which the customer can immediately
send a reply.
enriched_requirements.object: in the transaction alert SMS itself, to which the customer can immediately send a reply

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a direct link for lodging the complaints, with specific option
to report unauthorised electronic transactions shall be provided by the PB on home
page of its website.
enriched_requirements.object: PB on home page of its website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The loss/ fraud reporting system shall also ensure that
immediate response (including auto response) is sent to the customers
acknowledging the complaint along with the registered complaint number.
enriched_requirements.object: response (including auto response) is sent to the customers acknowledging the complaint along with the registered complaint

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
communication systems used by the PB to send alerts and receive their responses
thereto must record the time and date of delivery of the message and receipt of
customer's response, if any, to it.
enriched_requirements.object: date of delivery of the message and receipt of customer's response

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be important in determining the extent
of a customer's liability.
enriched_requirements.object: the extent of a customer's liability

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall not offer facility of electronic transactions, other
than ATM cash withdrawals, to customers who do not provide mobile numbers to
it.
enriched_requirements.object: transactions, other than ATM cash withdrawals, to customers who do not provide mobile numbers to it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On receipt of report of an unauthorised transaction from the customer, the PB
shall take immediate steps to prevent further unauthorised transactions in the
account.
enriched_requirements.object: prevent further unauthorised transactions in the account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A customer's entitlement to zero liability shall arise where the unauthorised
transaction occurs in the following events:
(1) Contributory fraud/ negligence/ deficiency on the part of the PB (irrespective of
whether the transaction is reported by the customer or not).
enriched_requirements.object: transaction occurs in the following events: (1) Contributory fraud/ negligence/ deficiency on the part of the PB (irrespe

conditions: where the loss is due to negligence by a customer

where he
/ she has shared the payment credentials
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A customer shall be liable for the loss occurring due to unauthorised transactions
in the following cases:
(1) In cases where the loss is due to negligence by a customer, such as where he
/ she has shared the payment credentials, the customer will bear the entire loss
until he / she reports the unauthorised transaction to the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: loss occurring due to unauthorised transactions in the following cases: (1) In cases where the loss is due to negligence by a custom

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any loss occurring
after the reporting of the unauthorised transaction shall be borne by the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: PB

conditions:
where the responsibility for the unauthorised electronic banking
transaction lies neither with the PB nor with the customer
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In cases where the responsibility for the unauthorised electronic banking
transaction lies neither with the PB nor with the customer, but lies elsewhere in
the system and the customer notifies the PB of such a transaction within four to
seven working days of receiving a communication of the transaction, the per
transaction liability of the customer shall be limited to the transaction value or the
amount mentioned in Table 1, whichever is lower.
enriched_requirements.object: transaction value or the amount mentioned in Table 1, whichever is lower

conditions: if the delay in reporting is beyond seven working days
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, if the delay in reporting is beyond seven working days, the customer
liability shall be determined as per the PB's Board approved policy.
enriched_requirements.object: the PB's Board approved policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall
provide the details of its policy regarding customers' liability formulated in
pursuance of these directions at the time of opening the accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: its policy regarding customers' liability formulated in pursuance of these directions at the time of opening the accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall
<image>
also display its approved policy in public domain for wider dissemination.
enriched_requirements.object: approved policy in public domain for wider dissemination

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
existing customers shall also be individually informed about the PB's policy.
enriched_requirements.object: about the PB's policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The number of working days mentioned in Table 2 shall be counted as per the
working schedule of the home branch of the customer excluding the date of
receiving the communication.
enriched_requirements.object: the working schedule of the home branch of the customer excluding the date of receiving the communication

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On being notified by the customer, a PB shall credit (shadow reversal) the amount
involved in the unauthorised electronic transaction to the customer's account within
10 working days from the date of such notification by the customer (without waiting
for settlement of insurance claim, if any).
enriched_requirements.object: amount involved in the unauthorised electronic transaction to the customer's account within 10 working days from the date of such notification by the customer (without waiting for settlement of insurance claim

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB may also, at its discretion, decide
to waive off any customer liability in case of unauthorised electronic banking
transactions even in cases of customer negligence.
enriched_requirements.object: decide to waive off any customer liability in case of unauthorised electronic banking transactions even in cases of customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit shall be value dated
to be as of the date of the unauthorised transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: be as of the date of the unauthorised transaction

conditions:
if any, established within
such time
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the PB shall ensure that:
(1) a complaint is resolved and liability of the customer, if any, established within
such time, as may be specified in the PB's Board approved policy, but not
exceeding 90 days from the date of receipt of the complaint, and the customer is
compensated as per provisions of paragraphs 24 to 29 above;
enriched_requirements.object: complaint is resolved and liability of the customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB
shall formulate / revise its customer relations policy, with approval of its Board, to
cover aspects of customer protection, including the mechanism of creating
customer awareness on the risks and responsibilities involved in electronic banking
transactions and customer liability in such cases of unauthorised electronic
banking transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: customer relations policy, with approval of its Board, to cover aspects of customer protection, including the mechanism of crea

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy must be transparent, non-discriminatory and shall
stipulate the mechanism of compensating the customers for the unauthorised
electronic banking transactions and also prescribe the timelines for effecting such
compensation keeping in view the instructions contained in paragraph 30 above.
enriched_requirements.object: compensating the customers for the unauthorised electronic banking transactions and also prescribe the timelines for effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall be displayed on the PB's website along with the details of
grievance handling / escalation procedure.
enriched_requirements.object: PB's website along with the details of grievance handling / escalation procedure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions contained in this
section shall be incorporated in the policy.
enriched_requirements.object: policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The burden of proving customer liability in case of unauthorised electronic banking
transactions shall lie on the PB.

A PB shall put in place a suitable mechanism and structure for the reporting of the
customer liability cases to the Board or one of its Committees.
enriched_requirements.object: suitable mechanism and structure for the reporting of the customer liability cases to the Board or one of its Committees

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The reporting shall,
inter alia, include volume / number of cases and the aggregate value involved and
distribution across various categories of cases, viz., card present transactions, card
not present transactions, internet banking, mobile banking, ATM transactions, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: volume / number of cases and the aggregate value involved and distribution across various categories of cases, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Standing Committee on Customer Service in the PB shall periodically review
the unauthorised electronic banking transactions reported by customers or
otherwise, as also the action taken thereon, the functioning of the grievance
redressal mechanism and take appropriate measures to improve the systems and
<image>
procedures.
enriched_requirements.object: electronic banking transactions reported by customers or otherwise, as also the action taken thereon, the functio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: All such transactions shall be reviewed by the PB's internal auditors.
enriched_requirements.object: PB's internal auditors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall work out the service charges for various types of services like charges
for cheque collection etc., with prior approval of its Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: charges for various types of services like charges for cheque collection etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These
charges shall be reasonable and not out of line with the average cost of providing
these services.
enriched_requirements.object: out of line with the average cost of providing these services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall also take care to ensure that customers with low
volume of activities are not penalised.
enriched_requirements.object: ensure that customers with low volume of activities are not penalised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall adopt / follow the principles outlined below for ensuring reasonableness
in fixing and communicating service charges.
enriched_requirements.object: principles outlined below for ensuring reasonableness in fixing and communicating service charges

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Identification of Basic Banking Services: A PB shall identify basic banking
services based on the following broad parameters:
Table 3
Sr.
enriched_requirements.object: based on the following broad parameters: Table 3 Sr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) Banking services that are ordinarily availed by individuals in the middle and
lower segments, shall be the first parameter.

The list of services identified is only an indicative one and the
PB may, at its discretion, include within the category of basic services such
additional services as it may consider appropriate.
enriched_requirements.object: include within the category of basic services such additional services as it may consider appropriate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Offering basic banking services outside the scope of bundled products: A
PB shall make available the basic banking services at reasonable prices / charges
and towards this, basic services shall be delivered outside the scope of bundled
products.
enriched_requirements.object: banking services at reasonable prices / charges and towards this, basic services shall be delivered outside the scope of bund

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Principles for ensuring reasonableness in fixing and communicating service
charges:
(1) For basic services to individuals, a PB shall levy charges at the rates that are
lower than the rates applied when the same services are given to non-
individuals.
enriched_requirements.object: rates that are lower than the rates applied when the same services are given to non- individuals

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) For basic services rendered to special category of individuals (such as
individuals in rural areas, pensioners and senior citizens), a PB shall levy
charges on more liberal terms than the terms on which the charges are levied
to other individuals.
enriched_requirements.object: liberal terms than the terms on which the charges are levied to other individuals

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) For the basic services rendered to individuals, a PB shall levy charges only if
the charges are just and supported by reason.
enriched_requirements.object: the charges are just and supported by reason

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) For the basic services to individuals, a PB shall levy services charges ad-
valorem only to cover any incremental cost and subject to a cap.
enriched_requirements.object: valorem only to cover any incremental cost and subject to a cap

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) A PB shall provide to the individual customers upfront and in a timely manner,
complete information on the charges applicable to all basic services.
enriched_requirements.object: customers upfront and in a timely manner, complete information on the charges applicable to all basic services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) A PB shall provide advance information to the individual customers about the
proposed changes in the service charges.
enriched_requirements.object: the individual customers about the proposed changes in the service charges

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) A PB shall collect for services given to individuals only such charges which have
been notified to the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: to individuals only such charges which have been notified to the customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) A PB shall inform the customers in an appropriate manner recovery of service
charges from the account or the transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: an appropriate manner recovery of service charges from the account or the transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(9) A PB shall without fail inform the customers in all cases when a transaction
initiated by the PB itself results in or is likely to lead to a shortfall in the minimum
balance required to be maintained.
enriched_requirements.object: customers in all cases when a transaction initiated by the PB itself results in or is likely to lead to a shortfall in the min

following instructions shall be followed in this regard:

(i) A PB shall communicate the service charges to new customers at the time of
beginning of the relationship.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Service charges shall be displayed in the notice board at the branch so as to
disseminate information to the customers / public, in addition to display on the
website, as per extant instructions of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: notice board at the branch so as to disseminate information to the customers / public, in addition to display on the website, as p

(iii) A PB shall also put in place appropriate methods for communicating the
service charges to customers of different profiles.
enriched_requirements.object: appropriate methods for communicating the service charges to customers of different profiles

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A PB shall take steps to ensure that any change in the service charges are
effected only with prior notification to the customers of at least 30 days.
enriched_requirements.object: that any change in the service charges are effected only with prior notification to the customers of at least 30 days

if not

(ii) A PB shall provide an option to the customer to accept the change and if not
accepted, to exit from the relationship with the PB within the above 30 days without
any cost.
enriched_requirements.object: the customer to accept the change and if not accepted, to exit from the relationship with the PB within the above 30 days without

(iii) A PB may consider the option of advertising the changes in service charges
in newspapers apart from including the information regarding the changes in any
communication sent to the customer.
