enriched_requirements.object: PB's website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall not allow any debit transaction in an inoperative account unless there
is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs
141 to 144 above.
enriched_requirements.object: in an inoperative account unless there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs 141 t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the PB may also consider imposing a cooling-off period
on reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may
be applicable for newly opened accounts with the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: cooling-off period on reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may be applicable for newl

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall ensure that there is no unauthorised access to customer data
pertaining to the inoperative accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: no unauthorised access to customer data pertaining to the inoperative accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall also ensure that adequate
steps are taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes.
enriched_requirements.object: steps are taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall provide on its website as well as at its branches, the information on
the process for activation of the inoperative account / unclaimed deposits and
claiming the balances therein.
enriched_requirements.object: as well as at its branches, the information on the process for activation of the inoperative account / unclaimed deposits and c

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Necessary claim forms and documents may be
made available for the benefit of customers.
enriched_requirements.object: the benefit of customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall conduct public awareness and financial literacy campaigns regularly
to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative accounts /
unclaimed deposits and the prescribed procedure to claim amounts lying therein
by a depositor or his / her nominee / legal heir in case of deceased depositor.
enriched_requirements.object: financial literacy campaigns regularly to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative accounts / un

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy and SOPs on
safe deposit locker facility/safe custody article as per the instructions mentioned
herein.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved policy and SOPs on safe deposit locker facility/safe custody article as per the instructions mentioned her

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The existing customers of a PB who have made an application for locker facility
and who are fully compliant with the Customer Due Diligence criteria under
the Reserve Bank of India (Payments Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions,
2025 may be given the facilities of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject
to on-going compliance.
enriched_requirements.object: of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject to on-going compliance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customers who are not having any other banking relationship with the PB may
be given the facilities of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying
with the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (Payments Banks - Know
Your Customer) Directions, 2025 and subject to on-going compliance.
enriched_requirements.object: of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying with the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (Payments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The due
diligence shall be carried out for all the customers in whatever rights and capacities
they may be hiring the locker.
enriched_requirements.object: all the customers in whatever rights and capacities they may be hiring the locker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall incorporate a clause in the locker agreement that the locker-hirer/s
shall not keep anything illegal or any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit
locker.
enriched_requirements.object: any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit locker

conditions:
If a PB suspects the deposit of any illegal or hazardous substance by any
customer in the safe deposit locker
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a PB suspects the deposit of any illegal or hazardous substance by any
customer in the safe deposit locker, the PB shall have the right to take appropriate
action against such customer as it deems fit and proper in the circumstances.
enriched_requirements.object: take appropriate action against such customer as it deems fit and proper in the circumstances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall obtain recent passport size photographs of locker-hirer(s) and
individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve in the
records pertaining to locker-hirer being maintained in the PB's branch.
enriched_requirements.object: photographs of locker-hirer(s) and individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve in the r

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to facilitate customers making informed choices, a PB shall maintain a
branch wise list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System
(CBS) or any other computerised system compliant with Cyber Security Framework
issued by RBI, for the purpose of allotment of lockers and ensure transparency in
<image>
allotment of lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System (CBS) or any other computerised system compliant with Cyber

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall acknowledge the receipt of all applications for
allotment of locker and provide a waitlist number to the customers, if the lockers
are not available for allotment.
enriched_requirements.object: all applications for allotment of locker and provide a waitlist number to the customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A PB shall have a Board approved agreement for safe deposit lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: agreement for safe deposit lockers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this
purpose, a PB may adopt the model locker agreement framed by IBA.
enriched_requirements.object: agreement framed by IBA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This
agreement shall be in conformity with these instructions and the directions of the
Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs United Bank of
India' (Judgment dated February 19, 2021 in CA No.
enriched_requirements.object: these instructions and the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs United Bank of India'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall
ensure that any unfair terms or conditions are not incorporated in its locker
agreements.
enriched_requirements.object: terms or conditions are not incorporated in its locker agreements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the terms of the contract shall not be more onerous than
required in ordinary course of business to safeguard the interests of the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: required in ordinary course of business to safeguard the interests of the PB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of allotment of the locker to a customer, a PB shall enter into an
agreement with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper
duly stamped.
enriched_requirements.object: with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper duly stamped

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the locker agreement in duplicate signed by both the
parties shall be furnished to the locker-hirer to know his / her rights and
responsibilities.
enriched_requirements.object: locker-hirer to know his / her rights and responsibilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Original Agreement shall be retained with the PB's branch where
the locker is situated.
enriched_requirements.object: PB's branch where the locker is situated

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There may be instances, where the agreements already executed by a PB with
its locker-hirer(s) are at variance with the IBA Model Agreement.

In such cases, all
the provisions contained in this section, in particular paragraphs 192 to 194 on
compensation policy / liability of PBs, shall continue to apply to them even if not
explicitly stated in the agreements already executed.
enriched_requirements.object: them even if not explicitly stated in the agreements already executed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in such cases, the
PB shall have the option to execute fresh agreements or revise them through
supplementary agreements.
enriched_requirements.object: execute fresh agreements or revise them through supplementary agreements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The cost of stamp paper in such cases shall be borne
by the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: PB

conditions: If locker rent is collected in advance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If locker rent is collected in advance, in the event of surrender of a locker by a
customer, the proportionate amount of advance rent collected shall be refunded to
the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: customer

conditions:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting
physical relocation of the lockers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting
physical relocation of the lockers, a PB shall give public notice in two newspapers
(including one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and the customers
shall be intimated at least two months in advance along with options for them to
change or close the facility.
enriched_requirements.object: two newspapers (including one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and the customers shall be intimated at least t

conditions:
In case of unplanned shifting due to natural calamities
or any other such emergency situation
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of unplanned shifting due to natural calamities
or any other such emergency situation, the PB shall make efforts to intimate its
customers suitably at the earliest.
enriched_requirements.object: its customers suitably at the earliest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall take necessary steps to ensure that the area in which the locker facility
is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins.
enriched_requirements.object: ensure that the area in which the locker facility is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The risks of
accessibility of an allotted locker from any side without involvement of the locker-
hirer concerned may be assessed and kept on record.
enriched_requirements.object: on record

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall have a single
defined point of entry and exit to the locker room / vault.
enriched_requirements.object: point of entry and exit to the locker room / vault

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The place where the
lockers are housed must be secured enough to protect against hazard of rain /
flood water entering and damaging the lockers in contingent situations.
enriched_requirements.object: protect against hazard of rain / flood water entering and damaging the lockers in contingent situations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The fire
hazard risks of the area should also be assessed and minimised.
enriched_requirements.object: minimised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB, as per its
policy, shall conduct necessary engineering / safety verification regularly to identify
the risks and carry out necessary rectification.
enriched_requirements.object: safety verification regularly to identify the risks and carry out necessary rectification

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The area housing the lockers shall remain adequately guarded at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: all times

conditions: if required as per its risk assessment
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB
shall install Access Control system, if required as per its risk assessment, which
would restrict any unauthorised entry and create digital record of access to locker
room with time log.

As per its internal security policy, a PB may cover the entry and
exit of the strong room and the common areas of operation under CCTV camera
and preserve its recording for a period of not less than 180 days.
enriched_requirements.object: exit of the strong room and the common areas of operation under CCTV camera and preserve its recording for a period of not less th

conditions:
In case any
customer has complained to a PB that his / her locker is opened without his / her
knowledge and authority
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case any
customer has complained to a PB that his / her locker is opened without his / her
knowledge and authority, or any theft or security breach is noticed / observed, the
PB shall preserve the CCTV recording till the police investigation is completed and
the dispute is settled.
enriched_requirements.object: till the police investigation is completed and the dispute is settled

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The security procedures shall be well documented and the staff concerned shall
be properly trained in the procedure.
enriched_requirements.object: the staff concerned shall be properly trained in the procedure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The internal auditors shall verify and report
the compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to.
enriched_requirements.object: compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the new mechanical lockers to be installed by a PB shall conform to basic
standards / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian
Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced industry standards applicable in this
regard.
enriched_requirements.object: / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced industry stand

conditions: In case the lockers are being operated through an electronic system
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the lockers are being operated through an electronic system, a PB shall
take reasonable steps to ensure that the system is protected against hacking or
any breach of security.
enriched_requirements.object: ensure that the system is protected against hacking or any breach of security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The customers' personal data, including their biometric
data, shall not be shared with third parties without their consent.
enriched_requirements.object: parties without their consent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a PB shall
ensure that the electronically operated lockers are compliant with the Cyber
Security Framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: operated lockers are compliant with the Cyber Security Framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The system shall be capable
of maintaining unalterable log of locker activities.
enriched_requirements.object: unalterable log of locker activities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall comply with the
relevant statutory / regulatory instructions / requirements applicable for IT / data
protection.
enriched_requirements.object: statutory / regulatory instructions / requirements applicable for IT / data protection

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the PB shall also devise a standard operating procedure for
issue of new password in lieu of lost passwords to customers in a safe and secure
manner in case of electronically operated lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: operating procedure for issue of new password in lieu of lost passwords to customers in a safe and secure manner in case of ele

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall ensure that identification Code of the PB / branch is embossed on all
the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers / locker ownership
by law enforcement agencies in case of need.
enriched_requirements.object: of the PB / branch is embossed on all the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers / locker o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the custodian of the locker
shall, regularly / periodically, check the keys maintained in the branch to ensure
that they are in proper condition.
enriched_requirements.object: check the keys maintained in the branch to ensure that they are in proper condition

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall permit the locker-hirer to operate the
locker only with the key provided by the PB, although there is no restriction in
allowing the customer to use an additional padlock of her / his own if there are such
provisions in lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: operate the locker only with the key provided by the PB, although there is no restriction in allowing the customer to use a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The locker hirer and / or the persons duly authorised by him / her only shall be
permitted to operate the locker after proper verification of their identity and
recording of the authorisation by the officials concerned of the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: the locker after proper verification of their identity and recording of the authorisation by the officials concerned of the PB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall
<image>
maintain a record of all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have accessed
the lockers and the date and time (both check-in and check-out time) on which they
have opened and closed the locker and obtain their signature.
enriched_requirements.object: of all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have accessed the lockers and the date and time (both check-in and chec

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The ingress and
egress register for access to Vault Room by locker-hirers or any other individual
including the PBs' staff shall be maintained to record the movement of individuals
in the Vault Room area with their signatures at appropriate place in the records.
enriched_requirements.object: the movement of individuals in the Vault Room area with their signatures at appropriate place in the records

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB's officer authorising the locker-hirer to access the locker, after unlocking
the first key / password shall not remain present when the locker is opened by the
locker-hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: locker is opened by the locker-hirer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall ensure that there is adequate privacy to the locker-hirers
in the operations when customers access the lockers at the same time.
enriched_requirements.object: adequate privacy to the locker-hirers in the operations when customers access the lockers at the same time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall send an email and SMS alert to the registered email address and
mobile number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive confirmation
intimating the date and time of the locker operation and the redressal mechanism
available in case of unauthorised locker access.
enriched_requirements.object: SMS alert to the registered email address and mobile number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive confirmation int

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a system of inter change of locks whenever the locker is
surrendered by the hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: inter change of locks whenever the locker is surrendered by the hirer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The keys of vacant lockers shall be kept in sealed
envelopes.
enriched_requirements.object: envelopes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The duplicate master keys shall be deposited with another branch of
the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: branch of the PB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: There shall be proper record of joint custody of master keys.
enriched_requirements.object: joint custody of master keys

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall
conduct surprise periodic verification of surrendered / vacant lockers and their keys
by an officer of the PB who is not connected with their custody and proper record
shall be maintained as a proof of such verification.
enriched_requirements.object: of surrendered / vacant lockers and their keys by an officer of the PB who is not connected with their custody

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall ensure that the Locker Register and the Locker Key Register are
maintained in CBS or any other computerised system compliant with the Cyber
Security Framework issued by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: Register and the Locker Key Register are maintained in CBS or any other computerised system compliant with the Cyber Security F

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Locker Register shall be
updated in case of any change in the allotment with complete audit trails.
enriched_requirements.object: of any change in the allotment with complete audit trails

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB custodian shall check whether the lockers are properly closed post locker
operation.
enriched_requirements.object: are properly closed post locker operation

conditions: If the same is not done

if registered or through
SMS
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the same is not done, the lockers must be immediately closed, and
the locker-hirer shall be promptly intimated through e-mail, if registered or through
SMS, if mobile number is registered or through letter so that they may verify any
resulting discrepancy in the contents of the locker.
enriched_requirements.object: e-mail

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB custodian shall record the
fact of not closing the locker properly in the register and its closure by the PB with
<image>
the date and time.
enriched_requirements.object: not closing the locker properly in the register and its closure by the PB with <image> the date and time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the custodian of the locker room shall carry out a
physical check of the locker room at the end of the day to ensure that lockers are
properly closed, and that no person is inadvertently trapped in the locker room after
banking hours.
enriched_requirements.object: check of the locker room at the end of the day to ensure that lockers are properly closed, and that no person is inadvertently tr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall have a clear Board approved policy together with a SOP for breaking
open the lockers for all possible situations keeping in view the relevant legal and
contractual provisions.
enriched_requirements.object: approved policy together with a SOP for breaking open the lockers for all possible situations keeping in view the relevant legal an

conditions: If the key of the locker
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the key of the locker, supplied by the PB is lost by the locker-hirer, the customer
(locker hirer) shall notify the PB immediately.

conditions: if found in future
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An undertaking may also be obtained
from the customer that the key lost, if found in future, will be handed over to the
PB.
enriched_requirements.object: the customer that the key lost

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All charges for opening the locker, changing the lock and replacing the lost key
may be recovered from the hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: hirer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The charges applicable for replacement of lost
keys / issue of new password shall be communicated to the locker hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: locker hirer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The operation shall be done in the presence of the customer/s and an authorised
official of the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: presence of the customer/s and an authorised official of the PB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker of a customer or
the articles left by a customer for safe custody of a PB by any Authority acting either
under the orders of a Court or any other competent authority vested with the power
to pass such orders, the PB shall co-operate in execution and implementation of
the orders.
enriched_requirements.object: implementation of the orders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall verify and satisfy itself about the orders and the connected documents
received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles in the
safe custody of the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: about the orders and the connected documents received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The customer (locker-hirer) shall be informed by letter as
well as by email / SMS to the registered email address / mobile phone number that
the Government Authorities have approached for attachment and recovery or
seizure of the locker or articles deposited for safe custody.
enriched_requirements.object: as well as by email / SMS to the registered email address / mobile phone number that the Government Authorities have approached

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An inventory of the
contents of locker and articles seized and recovered by the Authority shall be
prepared in the presence of such Government Authorities, two independent
witnesses and an officer of the PB and shall be signed by all.
enriched_requirements.object: presence of such Government Authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer of the PB and shall be signed by all

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the
inventory may be forwarded to the customer to the address available in the PB's
records or handed over to the customer against acknowledgement.
enriched_requirements.object: customer to the address available in the PB's records or handed over to the customer against acknowledgement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall also record a video of the break-open process and the inventory
assessment, wherever legally permissible, and preserve the video to produce as
evidence in case of any dispute or Court or fraud case in future.
enriched_requirements.object: of the break-open process and the inventory assessment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall have the discretion to break open any locker following due procedure
if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row.
enriched_requirements.object: break open any locker following due procedure if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall
ensure to notify the existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the allotment and
give him / her reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles deposited by him /
her.
enriched_requirements.object: existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the allotment and give him / her reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles de

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A clause may be incorporated in the locker agreement to this effect.
enriched_requirements.object: locker agreement to this effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before breaking open the locker, the PB shall give due notice to the locker-hirer
through a letter and through email and SMS alert to the registered email id and
mobile phone number.
enriched_requirements.object: the locker-hirer through a letter and through email and SMS alert to the registered email id and mobile phone number

conditions:
If the letter is returned undelivered or the locker-hirer is not
<image>
traceable
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the letter is returned undelivered or the locker-hirer is not
<image>
traceable, the PB shall issue public notice in two newspaper dailies (one in English
and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to any
other person/s who has interest in the contents of locker to respond.
enriched_requirements.object: two newspaper dailies (one in English and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to any other

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The locker shall be broken open in the presence of an officer of the PB and two
independent witnesses.
enriched_requirements.object: the presence of an officer of the PB and two independent witnesses

conditions:
In case of electronically operated lockers (including Smart
Vaults)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of electronically operated lockers (including Smart
Vaults), the use of 'Vault Administrator' password for opening of locker shall be
assigned to a senior official and complete audit trail of access shall be preserved.
enriched_requirements.object: senior official and complete audit trail of access shall be preserved

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the PB shall also record a video of the break open process together with
inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide
evidence in case of any dispute or Court case in future.
enriched_requirements.object: of the break open process together with inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide evidence in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall also ensure
that the details of breaking open of locker is documented in CBS or any other
computerised systems compliant with the Cyber Security Framework issued by
RBI, apart from locker register.
enriched_requirements.object: details of breaking open of locker is documented in CBS or any other computerised systems compliant with the Cyber Security Frame

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After breaking open of locker, the contents shall be kept in sealed envelope with
detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer claims
it.
enriched_requirements.object: envelope with detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer claims it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A record of access to the fireproof safe shall invariably be maintained.

While
returning the contents of the locker, the PB shall obtain acknowledgement of the
customer on the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future.
enriched_requirements.object: customer on the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall ensure that the inventory prepared after breaking open of the locker
is in the appropriate forms as provided in Annex II or (effective till March 31, 2026),
or Annex IX (effective on or after April 1, 2026 or if implemented earlier by the
bank) as near thereto as circumstances require.
enriched_requirements.object: prepared after breaking open of the locker is in the appropriate forms as provided in Annex II or (effective till March 31,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the PB shall not open
sealed / closed packets left with them for safe custody or found in locker while
releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker hirers / depositor of safe
custody article, unless required by law.
enriched_requirements.object: packets left with them for safe custody or found in locker while releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker hirers / depositor of safe custody article

conditions:
If the locker remains inoperative for a period of seven years and the locker-hirer
cannot be located
if rent is being paid regularly
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the locker remains inoperative for a period of seven years and the locker-hirer
cannot be located, even if rent is being paid regularly, a PB shall be at liberty to
transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the
articles in a transparent manner, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the articles in a transparent manner, as the case ma

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before breaking open the
locker, the PB shall follow the procedure as prescribed in paragraphs 186 to 189
<image>
above.
enriched_requirements.object: prescribed in paragraphs 186 to 189 <image> above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall ensure that the procedure to be followed by them for disposal
of the articles left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned
above is incorporated in their locker agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: to be followed by them for disposal of the articles left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned above i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall ensure that appropriate terms are inserted in the locker agreement
executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in
operation for long period.
enriched_requirements.object: are inserted in the locker agreement executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in ope

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A clause may also be incorporated in the locker
agreement to discharge the PB from liability in case the locker is not in operation
and the locker is opened by the PB and contents are released as per law and as
per the instructions issued by the Reserve Bank and the terms and conditions
prescribed in the agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: the locker agreement to discharge the PB from liability in case the locker is not in operation and the locker is opened by the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall put in place a detailed Board approved policy outlining the
responsibility owed by it for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due
to its negligence as it owes a separate duty of care to exercise due diligence in
maintaining and operating its locker or safety deposit systems.
enriched_requirements.object: detailed Board approved policy outlining the responsibility owed by it for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due to its

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the PB shall adhere to the Master Directions on Frauds
for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities, thefts and
burglaries.
enriched_requirements.object: Directions on Frauds for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities, thefts and burglaries

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall not be liable for any damage and / or loss of contents of locker arising
from natural calamities or acts of God like earthquake, floods, lightning and
thunderstorm or any act that is attributable to the sole fault or negligence of the
customer.
enriched_requirements.object: damage and / or loss of contents of locker arising from natural calamities or acts of God like earthquake, floods, lightning and thu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall, however, exercise appropriate care to its locker systems
to protect its premises from such catastrophes.
enriched_requirements.object: care to its locker systems to protect its premises from such catastrophes

conditions:
where loss of
contents of locker are due to incidents mentioned above or attributable to fraud
committed by its employee(s)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As the PB cannot claim that it bears no liability
towards its customers for loss of contents of the locker, in instances where loss of
contents of locker are due to incidents mentioned above or attributable to fraud
committed by its employee(s), the PB's liability shall be for an amount equivalent
to one hundred times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker.
enriched_requirements.object: equivalent to one hundred times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB, with the approval of its Board, shall have a branch insurance policy to
minimise the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during
shifting / merger of branch, etc., affecting contents of lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: policy to minimise the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during shifting / merger of branch,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall clarify in its locker agreement that as it does not keep a record of the
contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein by the
customer, they would not be under any liability to insure the contents of the locker
against any risk whatsoever.
enriched_requirements.object: agreement that as it does not keep a record of the contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall under no circumstances offer, directly
or indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker
contents.
enriched_requirements.object: directly or indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall display the model locker agreement with all the Terms & Conditions
and the SOPs on various aspects on its website and / or at branches (if official
website is not available) where locker facility is being provided by it for public
viewing.
enriched_requirements.object: agreement with all the Terms & Conditions and the SOPs on various aspects on its website and / or at branches (if official we

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall ensure that the customers are made aware of the PB's terms
and conditions to avail those facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: are made aware of the PB's terms and conditions to avail those facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall display updated information on all kinds of charges for safe deposit
lockers and safe custody articles on its website.
enriched_requirements.object: all kinds of charges for safe deposit lockers and safe custody articles on its website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall place on its website, the instructions together with the policies /
procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to the
<image>
nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s) of the deceased locker hirer / safe custody
article.
enriched_requirements.object: the instructions together with the policies / procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a printed copy of the same shall also be given to the nominee(s) /
survivor(s) / legal heir(s).
enriched_requirements.object: the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, these directions are
issued to banks to implement the nomination facility and shall be read with sections
45ZA to 45ZG of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 and the Nomination Rules
framed thereunder.
enriched_requirements.object: 45ZA to 45ZG of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 and the Nomination Rules framed thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall offer nomination facility in deposit accounts in accordance with the
provisions of sections 45ZA, 45ZB and 45ZG of the Act and the Rules.
enriched_requirements.object: deposit accounts in accordance with the provisions of sections 45ZA, 45ZB and 45ZG of the Act and the Rules

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall be guided by the provisions of sections 45ZC to 45ZG of the Act and
the Rules in the matter of nomination in safe deposit lockers and articles kept in
safe custody.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions of sections 45ZC to 45ZG of the Act and the Rules in the matter of nomination in safe deposit lockers and articles kept in

conditions:
if an individual
is keeping an account for his/ her proprietorship business
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: For the purpose of these Directions, it is clarified that if an individual
is keeping an account for his/ her proprietorship business, it will be deemed as that
individual's account and the nomination facility shall be offered in such accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of account opening, a PB shall explicitly inform the prospective
customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him /
her the option to avail the same.
enriched_requirements.object: customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him / her the option to avail the same

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall also clearly explain to the prospective
customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to
simplification of the claim process in the event of the account holder's demise and
facilitation of smooth and prompt transfer of funds to the nominee without legal
complications.
enriched_requirements.object: the prospective customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to simplification of the claim p

conditions:
If the prospective customer chooses not to avail the nomination facility despite
<image>
being fully informed
if otherwise found eligible
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the prospective customer chooses not to avail the nomination facility despite
<image>
being fully informed, the PB shall proceed to open the deposit account without
imposing any restrictions, if otherwise found eligible, after obtaining a written
declaration from the individual confirming that he / she does not require the
nomination facility at the time of account opening.
enriched_requirements.object: deposit account without imposing any restrictions

conditions:
If he / she refuses to provide the
written declaration
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If he / she refuses to provide the
written declaration, the PB shall record the fact of refusal to submit written
confirmation in the account opening records.
enriched_requirements.object: refusal to submit written confirmation in the account opening records

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Under no circumstances shall a prospective customer be denied or delayed in
opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination, provided
all other requirements for account opening are satisfactorily met.
enriched_requirements.object: denied or delayed in opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination

conditions: In case of simultaneous nomination

if any nominee dies prior to receiving the
deposit from a PB
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of simultaneous nomination, if any nominee dies prior to receiving the
deposit from a PB, the nomination in respect of such nominee alone shall become
ineffective.

Accordingly, a PB shall settle the claims of the amount of deposit made
in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts
without nominee clause as contained in paragraphs 223 to 230 of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: the amount of deposit made in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts without nominee clause

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall have in place appropriate systems and procedures to register in its
books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the
request of the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: systems and procedures to register in its books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the r

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall devise proper systems for acknowledging the receipt of the duly
completed forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of the nomination.
enriched_requirements.object: acknowledging the receipt of the duly completed forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of the nomination

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall verify and ensure that the nomination(s) made by its customers are in
accordance with relevant provisions of the Act and the Rules before providing
acknowledgement to them.
enriched_requirements.object: the nomination(s) made by its customers are in accordance with relevant provisions of the Act and the Rules before providing ac

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such acknowledgement shall be given to the customers within three working
days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of
nomination, irrespective of whether the same is asked for by the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: customers within three working days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of nomination, irrespective

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where a nomination request is found not to be in conformity with the provisions
of the Act or the Rules and is consequently rejected, a PB shall inform the customer
<image>
in writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working
days of the receipt of the request form.
enriched_requirements.object: in writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days of the receipt of the request for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall record the status regarding registration of nomination on the face of
the passbook/ Statement of Account, with the legend "Nomination Registered".
enriched_requirements.object: registration of nomination on the face of the passbook/ Statement of Account, with the legend "Nomination Registered"

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall also indicate the name of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook/ Statement
of Accounts in such cases.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook/ Statement of Accounts in such cases

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall give wide publicity and provide guidance to deposit account holders,
locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the
nomination facility.
enriched_requirements.object: provide guidance to deposit account holders, locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the n

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This may include printing compatible messages on cheque
book, passbook and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching
periodical awareness drives.
enriched_requirements.object: on cheque book, passbook and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical awareness dr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall ensure that the form for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe deposit
lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the details
of nomination, which also serves the purpose of educating the customers about
availability of such facility.
enriched_requirements.object: for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe deposit lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the

conditions:
in case of Government
savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
(SCSS)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The directions given in this section shall not be applicable in case of Government
savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
(SCSS), Public Provident Fund (PPF), etc.
enriched_requirements.object: of Government savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme (SCSS), Public Provident Fund (PPF), e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Settlement of claims in such cases shall
be as per the provisions of the respective schemes.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions of the respective schemes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the limited purpose of directions in this section, unless the context otherwise
requires, the following definitions shall apply:
(1) 'Customer' refers to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has
placed articles in safe custody with a PB.
enriched_requirements.object: to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has placed articles in safe custody with a PB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) 'Threshold limit' means ₹15 lakh or such higher limit as may be fixed by a PB.
enriched_requirements.object: PB

conditions:
where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the
provisions of the Banking Regulation Act

where the account was opened
with survivorship clause
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A deposit account where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the
provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or where the account was opened
with survivorship clause, the payment of the outstanding balance upon the death
of the depositor(s) to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) shall be considered a valid
discharge of a PB's liability, provided:
(1) the PB has exercised due care and caution in establishing the identity of the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) and the deceased status of the account holder(s) by
obtaining appropriate documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
enriched_requirements.object: discharge of a PB's liability

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) it has been made clear in writing to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) that they would
be receiving the payment from the PB as a trustee of the legal heirs of the deceased
depositor(s), i.e., such payment to them shall not affect the right or claim which any
person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment
made to them.
enriched_requirements.object: claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment made to them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Payment made to the nominee(s) / survivor(s), subject to the foregoing
conditions, shall constitute a full and valid discharge of a PB's liability.
enriched_requirements.object: valid discharge of a PB's liability

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore,
in such cases, while making payment to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) of the
deceased depositor(s), the PB shall not insist on production of legal documents
such as Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or
seek any bond of indemnity / surety from the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / third-party,
irrespective of the amount standing to the credit of the deceased account holder(s).
enriched_requirements.object: legal documents such as Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
The PB shall require submission of the following documents in such cases:
(1) Claim form, as given in Annex IV, duly signed by the nominee(s) / survivor(s);
enriched_requirements.object: following documents in such cases: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex IV, duly signed by the nominee(s) / survivor(s)

conditions:
where the aggregate amount
payable

in case of a joint
account
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship
to the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), a PB shall follow a simplified procedure for
settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount
payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than
the threshold limit, provided
(1) a deceased depositor(s) had not made any nomination or in case of a joint
account, the account was without nominee / survivorship clause,
(2) there is no Will left behind by the deceased depositor(s),
(3) there is no contesting claim, and
(4) there is no order from a competent court in the knowledge of the PB,
restraining the claimant(s) from receiving nor the PB from making the payment.
enriched_requirements.object: for settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit
to the threshold limit based on: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex V, duly filled in and signed by the claimant(s) other than thos

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No bond of surety from a third-party shall be obtained in case of claims up to the
threshold limit.
enriched_requirements.object: of claims up to the threshold limit

conditions: where claim amount is above the threshold limit
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where claim amount is above the threshold limit, a PB shall settle the
claim based on:
(1) Succession Certificate and documents mentioned at paragraphs 224 (1) to (3)
above;
enriched_requirements.object: on: (1) Succession Certificate and documents mentioned at paragraphs 224 (1) to (3) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, a PB shall call for the documents at paragraphs 224 (1) to (5)
above.
enriched_requirements.object: at paragraphs 224 (1) to (5) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB may also call for a bond of surety, as given in Annex VI, from
third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are
acceptable to the PB and good for the claim amount.
enriched_requirements.object: bond of surety, as given in Annex VI, from third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are acceptable t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased depositor on
the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addition to
documents mentioned at paragraphs 224 (1) to (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: left behind by a deceased depositor on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addit

conditions:
where a person
other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where a person
other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable documents
shall also be obtained from her / him.
enriched_requirements.object: her / him

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the PB shall additionally
call for the documents mentioned at paragraphs 224 (4) and (5) above.
enriched_requirements.object: documents mentioned at paragraphs 224 (4) and (5) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of contesting claims or dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or the
beneficiaries named in the Will of the deceased depositor, a PB shall settle claims
on the basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate
or Court order / decree, as applicable, and the documents mentioned at
paragraphs 224 (1) to (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate or Court order / decree, as applicable, and the do

conditions:
where there is an order from a Court
restraining a PB from making the payment
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where there is an order from a Court
restraining a PB from making the payment, the claim shall not be entertained during
the period the order is in force.
enriched_requirements.object: period the order is in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The settlement of claim shall be considered based
on subsequent Court order to that effect.
enriched_requirements.object: subsequent Court order to that effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No bond of surety shall be insisted from a third party in cases falling under either
E.1.2.2.1 or E.1.2.2.2 above.
enriched_requirements.object: third party in cases falling under either E

conditions:
in case any credit is received in the
name of a deceased depositor
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Post settlement of the deposit account(s), in case any credit is received in the
name of a deceased depositor, a PB shall return the same to the remitter with the
remark 'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal
heir(s).
enriched_requirements.object: the remitter with the remark 'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The nominee(s) / legal heir(s) of a missing person shall be required to get an
order from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the
Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023.
enriched_requirements.object: an order from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The claim in respect of such missing person
shall be settled as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect
of a deceased customer.
enriched_requirements.object: the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, a copy of the court order declaring the civil
death of the account holder shall be obtained in lieu of the death certificate.
enriched_requirements.object: of the death certificate

conditions: where the aggregate amount payable
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship to the common person
where the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of
the application is less than ₹1 lakh or such higher amount as may be fixed by a
<image>
PB, a copy of the First Information Report (FIR) and non-traceable report issued
by police authorities shall be obtained in lieu of death certificate or an order from a
competent court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the claim.
enriched_requirements.object: of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the claim

conditions:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the
locker in case of her / his death
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the
locker in case of her / his death, the PB shall give access of the locker to such
nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker.
enriched_requirements.object: locker to such nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker

conditions:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures, and the locker hirers nominate any other individual(s), in the event of
death of any of the locker hirers, a PB shall give access of the locker and the liberty
to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s).
enriched_requirements.object: locker and the liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the locker was hired jointly with survivorship clause and the hirers
instructed that the access of the locker should be given to "either or survivor",
"anyone or survivor" or "former or survivor" or according to any other survivorship
clause permissible under the provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, a PB
shall follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker
hirers.
enriched_requirements.object: the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers

conditions: In case of a minor nominee
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of a minor nominee, a PB shall ensure that, the contents of locker, when
sought to be removed on behalf of the minor nominee, are handed over to the
guardian whose details have been provided in the nomination form.
enriched_requirements.object: of locker

conditions:
If the details
of the guardian have not been provided in the nomination form
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the details
of the guardian have not been provided in the nomination form, a PB shall hand
over the contents of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the
contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor.
enriched_requirements.object: of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor
PB for processing the claim in cases falling under paragraphs 233 and 234 above: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex IV , duly signed b

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall, however, ensure the following before giving access to the contents
to the nominee(s) / survivor(s):
(1) Exercise due care and caution in establishing the identity of the nominee(s)/
survivor(s) and deceased status of the locker hirer(s) by obtaining appropriate
documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
enriched_requirements.object: following before giving access to the contents to the nominee(s) / survivor(s): (1) Exercise due care and caution in establishin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) Make it clear to the nominee(s)/ survivor(s) that access and liberty to remove
the contents of the locker is given to them only as a trustee of the legal heir(s) of
the deceased locker hirer(s), i.e., such access and liberty to remove the contents
given to them shall not affect the right or claim which any person may have against
the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given.
enriched_requirements.object: claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After receipt of the documents mentioned at paragraph 237 above and being
satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, a PB shall correspond with the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory
of the contents of the safe deposit locker.
enriched_requirements.object: / survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall be undertaken in the
presence of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised
representatives, two independent witnesses (should not be employee or ex-
employee of the PB), the safe deposit vault custodian and another employee of the
PB not associated with locker operations, and recorded as per the inventory form
given in Annex IX .
enriched_requirements.object: presence of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two independent witnesses (should not

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PB shall then hand over the possession of the contents of
the locker to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the
contents on behalf of the minor, as the case may be, and obtain an
acknowledgment, as given in Annex IX, that all the contents in the locker of the
deceased hirer(s) have been removed and the locker is empty, and they have no
objection to allotment of the locker to any other locker hirer as per norms of the PB.
enriched_requirements.object: possession of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the contents on behalf o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Production of legal documents, viz., Succession Certificate, Letter of
Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or Bond of indemnity from the nominee(s)/
survivor(s) shall not be required unless there is any discrepancy in nomination.
enriched_requirements.object: is any discrepancy in nomination

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 233 to 240 above, shall be followed
mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe
custody of a PB.
enriched_requirements.object: for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of a PB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, inventory form given in Annex X shall be used in such
cases.
enriched_requirements.object: cases

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship
to the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), the PB shall adopt a simplified procedure for
settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst
the legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and
(1) the deceased locker hirer(s) had not made any nomination, or
(2) the joint hirers had not given any mandate that the access may be given to one
or more of the survivors by a clear survivorship clause, or
(3) there is no 'Will' left behind by the deceased locker hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: for settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases falling under the simplified procedure, a PB shall obtain the following
documents to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as
Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Court order, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Cou

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased safe deposit
locker hirer on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable,
in addition to documents mentioned at paragraphs 243 (1) to (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: left behind by a deceased safe deposit locker hirer on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as appl

conditions: where a person other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases
where a person other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will,
applicable documents shall also be obtained from her / him.
enriched_requirements.object: her / him

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, a PB may exercise discretion and act as per 'Will' of the deceased
without requiring production of the probate of such Will, provided the same is not
inconsistent with applicable laws, there is no dispute regarding the Will amongst
the legal heir(s) and/ or beneficiaries named in the Will and the PB is otherwise
satisfied as to the genuineness of the Will.
enriched_requirements.object: as per 'Will' of the deceased without requiring production of the probate of such Will

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the PB shall additionally
call for the documents mentioned at paragraphs 243 (4) and (5) above.
enriched_requirements.object: documents mentioned at paragraphs 243 (4) and (5) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Cases involving dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or beneficiaries named
in the Will, as applicable, shall be settled based on Probate of Will or Succession
Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order / decree, as the case may be,
and the documents mentioned at paragraphs 243 (1) to (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order / decree, as the case may be, and the documen

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After receipt of the required documents in claims falling under categories at
E.2.2.1 and E.2.2.2 above and being satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, a
PB shall correspond with the claimant(s) in writing and fix a date and time for
making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in form
prescribed in Annex IX, in the presence of all claimant(s) or their duly authorised
representatives, two independent witnesses (should not be employee or ex-
employee of the PB), the safe deposit vault custodian and another employee of the
PB not associated with locker operations.
enriched_requirements.object: in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Valuation of the contents of the safe
deposit locker shall be carried out by an independent valuer and recorded in the
Bond of Indemnity as given in Annex XI.
enriched_requirements.object: an independent valuer and recorded in the Bond of Indemnity as given in Annex XI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The claimant(s) or their duly authorised
representative(s) may remove the contents of the locker subsequent to submission
of the Bond of Indemnity.
enriched_requirements.object: the locker subsequent to submission of the Bond of Indemnity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Bond of Indemnity shall not be required to be given in
<image>
cases of claims settled on the basis of legal documents such as Probate of Will or
Succession Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order / decree, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: given in <image> cases of claims settled on the basis of legal documents such as Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 242 to 247 above, shall be followed
mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe
custody of a PB.
enriched_requirements.object: for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of a PB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall use the standardised forms for receiving the claims and other
documents as per the formats provided in Annex IV to Annex XI.
enriched_requirements.object: for receiving the claims and other documents as per the formats provided in Annex IV to Annex XI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The standardised forms and other documents required for settlement of claims
with respect to the deposit accounts / safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody
kept by a deceased customer shall be made available in all the branches as well
as on the PB's website for the convenience of the claimant(s).
enriched_requirements.object: all the branches as well as on the PB's website for the convenience of the claimant(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the PB shall
also display on its website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and
the procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various scenarios.
enriched_requirements.object: website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A claimant shall be allowed to lodge the claim at any of the branches against
acknowledgment.
enriched_requirements.object: the claim at any of the branches against acknowledgment

conditions:
In case all required documents for processing of the claim have
been submitted by the claimant
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case all required documents for processing of the claim have
been submitted by the claimant, a PB shall also issue a confirmation in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: in this regard

conditions: in case of any pending or incomplete / incorrect documents
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of any pending or incomplete / incorrect documents, the PB shall
intimate the claimant about the list of such documents while acknowledging the
receipt of claim.
enriched_requirements.object: the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt of claim

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On subsequent submission of all the required documents, the PB
shall issue a confirmation to the claimant that all required documents have been
received for processing of the claim.
enriched_requirements.object: the claimant that all required documents have been received for processing of the claim

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A PB may provide the facility for online lodgement of such claims.
enriched_requirements.object: online lodgement of such claims

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Upon a
claimant uploading the claim form along with the required documents, the PB shall
send acknowledgement / confirmation through appropriate channels and also
make available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim.
enriched_requirements.object: through appropriate channels and also make available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim

conditions:
if a PB requires the claimant to produce original documents for submission
/ verification
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such
cases, if a PB requires the claimant to produce original documents for submission
/ verification, the same shall be allowed to be done at any of its branches.
enriched_requirements.object: done at any of its branches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall settle a claim in respect of deposit accounts of a deceased customer
within a period not exceeding 15 calendar days from the date of receipt of all the
required documents associated with the claim.
enriched_requirements.object: respect of deposit accounts of a deceased customer within a period not exceeding 15 calendar days from the date of receipt of all th

conditions: In case of safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody
enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 15
calendar days of receipt of all the required documents
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody, a PB shall, within 15
calendar days of receipt of all the required documents, process the claim and
communicate with the claimant(s) for fixing the date for making inventory of the
locker / articles in safe custody.
enriched_requirements.object: days of receipt of all the required documents, process the claim and communicate with the claimant(s) for fixing the date for mak

conditions:
If any deposit related claim is not settled within the timeframe stipulated at
paragraph 253 above
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If any deposit related claim is not settled within the timeframe stipulated at
paragraph 253 above, then a PB shall communicate the reasons for such delay to
the claimant(s).
enriched_requirements.object: such delay to the claimant(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in cases of delay attributable to the PB, compensation
shall be paid by the PB in the form of interest, at a rate not less than the prevailing
Bank Rate + 4 percent per annum, on the settlement amount due for the period of
delay.
enriched_requirements.object: PB in the form of interest, at a rate not less than the prevailing Bank Rate + 4 percent per annum, on the settlement amount due for th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The reference date for reckoning the amount due and the prevailing Bank
Rate shall be the date of receipt of all required documents from the claimant.
enriched_requirements.object: receipt of all required documents from the claimant

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For claims related to safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody, a PB shall be
required to pay compensation to the claimant(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day
of delay, in cases where it doesn't adhere to the timeline prescribed in paragraph
254 above.
enriched_requirements.object: compensation to the claimant(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay, in cases where it doesn't adhere to the timeline presc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, a PB shall follow the procedure for
settlement of claims in respect of such accounts as has been prescribed above for
the accounts with / without nominee / survivorship clause, as applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: settlement of claims in respect of such accounts as has been prescribed above for the accounts with / without nominee / survi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, a PB shall accept the
original certified copy of the document issued for 'proof of death', certified in the
country of its issuance in any one of the following modes:
<image>
(1) authorised officials of overseas branches of Scheduled Commercial Banks
registered in India;
enriched_requirements.object: copy of the document issued for 'proof of death', certified in the country of its issuance in any one of the following m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A PB shall continue to spread awareness among its customers about the benefits
of the nomination facility / survivorship clause and give wide publicity to these
facilities along with the procedure for settlement of claims.
enriched_requirements.object: among its customers about the benefits of the nomination facility / survivorship clause and give wide publicity to these

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and
guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to
remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue
to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments
granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

Annex II - Forms for inventory (existing)
In exercise of the powers conferred on the Reserve Bank of India by sub-section (3) of section
45ZC and sub-section (4) of section 45ZE of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, read with
Section 56 of the Act ibid (for co-operative banks) respectively, the Reserve Bank of India
hereby directs that the inventory to be prepared before returning articles left in safe custody
and the inventory to be prepared before permitting removal of the contents of a safety locker,
shall respectively be in the appropriate Forms set out as enclosed or as near thereto as
circumstances require.
